channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Xbox cuts prices for Game Pass but ends day-one Call of Duty access - BBC
item.description:
1. Xbox cuts prices for Game Pass but ends day-one Call of Duty access  BBC

  5. "Xbox Game Pass has hit its limits — defined by Call of Duty": A massive price cut is coming in 2026  Windows Central

item.title: Action Hero Watches You Can Buy Now on Amazon - TMZ

item.title: The Arab Israeli Engineer From Haifa Poised to Become One of Apple's Top Leaders - Haaretz
item.description:
1. The Arab Israeli Engineer From Haifa Poised to Become One of Apple's Top Leaders  Haaretz
  2. Johny Srouji named Apple’s Chief Hardware Officer  Apple
  3. Apple's elevation of silicon head Johny Srouji signals sprint to build in-house chips for all devices  CNBC
  4. Apple refocuses hardware team on five key areas under new chief hardware officer Johny Srouji (AAPL:NASDAQ)  Seeking Alpha
  5. Apple to Focus Hardware Team on Five Areas Under Johny Srouji  Bloomberg.com

item.title: Amazon upgrades to Gigabit with its new Fire TV Ethernet adapter, but there’s a catch - AFTVnews
item.description:
1. Amazon upgrades to Gigabit with its new Fire TV Ethernet adapter, but there’s a catch  AFTVnews
  2. Amazon launches its slimmest ever streaming device, the Fire TV Stick HD  About Amazon
  3. Amazon releases second Fire TV stick with Vega OS, plans to bring it to all future models  lowpass.cc
  4. Amazon chooses nuclear option for Fire TV Sticks – no Android, no sideloading, no installing apps  t3.com
  5. Amazon is Warning Some Users That You Can’t Sideload Apps on the New Fire Stick HD  | Cord Cutters News
